headline: Q4 Earnings Roundup: Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) And The Rest Of The Health Insurance Providers Segment
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the health insurance providers industry, including Elevance Health (NYSE:ELV) and its peers.

headline: Elevance Health Announces Leadership Appointments to Strengthen Execution and Drive Growth
summary: INDIANAPOLIS, March 31, 2026--Elevance Health, Inc. (NYSE: ELV) today announced a series of leadership appointments across its Health Benefits and Carelon organizations, positioning the company to strengthen execution, enhance operational performance, and drive continued growth across its businesses.

headline: Elevance fills slew of mid-level leadership positions
summary: The insurer has been overhauling its executive bench as it attempts to bolster flagging profits in health benefits and capitalize on growth in Carelon, including through six new appointments on Tuesday.
